name: Into the Pit
author: Poki
description: Into the Pit Into The Pit is an action arcade game that puts you into intense combat. Collect coins by defeating enemies to pass onto the next stage, but be careful for the boss fights! Dodge enemies and shoot around to clear each stage while picking up power-ups to make the gameplay explosive and try survive the challenge! How to play Into the Pit ? WASD or Arrow keys to move / aim powerups Play on desktop or on mobile on Poki. If you are interested in games similar to Into the Pit, have a look at our Arcade Games. Enjoy surfing here on Poki!
